text: Dishonest, rude and incompetent, they took money without providing any service. I took a hot spot that they never set it up, I wasted a significant  amount of  time and energy going back and forth their stores and calling them to get it sorted and they did not resolve anything, never provided a pin either despite being claimed several times. I returned the hot spot and cancelled the account after 9 days struggling with them during their trial period and I was not supposed to be charged. However, they took money from my account, misused my personal information, and when I called them to claim they left me again waiting in limbo. STAY AWAY!! It will be a never ending story, the best recommendation is: be transparent and honest or close the business right away.

I am transferring to another provider, and they are refusing to unlock my phone. My service was cancelled before I was able to get the other provider set up. I think they corrupted my phone, but just after my service was cancelled, my phone gave me the data corrupted page. I have a CGM device for my diabetes to monitor my blood sugar. That is monitored and tested through my phone. But now since my phone is completely not working I am unable to currently monitor my blood sugar away from home. I have been told more than once they will not unlock my phone due to my bill being past due. I have not been able to keep my bill caught up because of a billing issue on their end that they refused to fix. The customer service is just keeps giving me the run around even after I told them that I have a medical device that needs my phone to monitor and track my condition.

My carrier is one of your affiliates. Never hadvso many problems til t-moble bought them out. Now,nothing but PROBLEMS. 
To top it off t-moble keeps sending me text that I've won certain products. I go through process of survey. Even pay shipping.  Now I keep text from postal service saying shipment held because of address problem & another shipping fee. Which I paid. On top of that every time I go into postal msg to try & resolve, up pops another t-moble "you a winner of another product, another survey, & these trophy cups saying "pick your reward" and survey crap again. Only this time,when I try to go back to postal text, it just keeps going back & forth between "your a winner of..claim..survey -to-teophy cups... survey..claim blah blah blah- & repeat even got emails regarding 1 of the 2 items i claimed, payed fees, and still same thing. Oh, plus the schedule delivery.comes up as well. I do, gives me a 3 days later date, & ask for shipment billing again.
Got email listing payment too. 
Bookmarked & copied in various places. All this started on December 
16 2022 & is still going on daily since. Same, your a 'winner. Same prizes. Same surveys. Same postal delivery problem/request,etc, etc... It is now January  10th, 2023.
And this is just the latest problem. 
Text of people I don't know conversing with each other.  Calls & text for a specific lady, including her doctor appointments. Phone going to every app but the one I'm trying to open.
Since t-moble  took over my carrier service it been one Big Mess. Got tired of run around at where I bought phone. So I just deal with it cause of health issues I have to have a phone. And I pay for my phone unlimited data plan, because I'm not tech savey.. don't understand data & gb stuff.  I'm 57 yrs old. All that's over my head. Heck I  only need about 6 or 7 apps that come on phone. Rest are complicated non essentials.

Misleading offers. I had to make 5 calls to clarify the offer that they pay for Netflix and in the end it turns out that it is not what they offer in the store or in the promotions. It hurts that a company supposedly one of the best on the market falls for this type of practice

For the time I switched to TMobile I was expecting the 50gb high speed data that i was agreefully paying $60/month for however data speeds were very slow and after checking a months usage it would not exceed more than 3gb of used data. For the month of December I removed my autopay feature and removed my "essentials" plan. From that day i had recieved abosolutly 0gb of data after checking in and being assured that I was covered for the month of December. After switching to Boost mobile at the end of the month, I recieved a bill in the mail from TMobile claiming that I must pay for the month i had recieved 0gb of data usage or they threaten to collect activity on my account. I reached out to a TMobile representative after searching thru the website, google, and other forums for a number that was not completely automated and resulted in a dead end of a robot telling me "goodbye". The representative i spoke with was considerate and spoke to her team about my concerns, however assured me that I voluntarily agreed to pay for the bill at the beginning of the month, so imust fulful my agreement even after recieving 0gb of data and the stress of having no service can put you through. I feel awful for the employees at TMobile who do their best to handle the issues that the terrible company that TMobile is, causes. After months of being under TMobiles coverage i have come to the conculsion that i will never be using them again and highly recommend against using them as well. I feel like I was told lies and that I have been scammed out of what I thought was going to be a good investment of money. I wish I could give a rating of zero stars as paying for my TMobile coverage has caused me more stress than not having a phone plan at all.

What a JOKE!!! We have called 12 times since Christmas Day for T-Mobile to reboot our internet as it just quit!!!

I do NOT recommend T-Mobile EVER!!!
What a waste of time
Over charged me 2 months after I left. No one to help. I'm gone for good. You've been warned!!!
Every time I call, they say different lie. I do not even know how they can come up with so many lies. They just want you to get off the phone without solving any problems.

Joined at my husbands insistence as he felt they would be better on our trips out of the US as well as here.  I came from Verizon with my phone. Big mistake. Voice mails would not show up from o hours to days later.  It was difficult for connectivity in Italy.  Not sure of what all I missed that was not brought to my attention.   I called T-Mobile repeatedly which got me multiple hours of trouble shooting, being told I needed to update. I even talked with Apple who said they sometimes see this when you change carrier's but use the same phone from the original carrier.  I gave up and have ordered a new phone from T-mobile hoping that my voice mails and connectivity issues will be resolved.  Seems you should not change carriers whiteout getting a new phone from the new carrier.  With all the promotions I would have thought they might have comped a phone given the hours of my time wasted when they surly know the phone you bring from another carrier will have all kinds of issues with their service. DM

I can buy my mobile phone needs anywhere; almost endless choices...and twice now, it's the person on the other side of the counter that keeps me coming back! This time around, hat's off to " Iveth", "Oscar" & 'Frankie' all from the Port Washington NY shop... It took me a few visits to finally figure out what I wanted/needed and in every case.. this trio was more than helpful...  You are still not forgiven for  the data breech which found my material on the Dark Web, but I've been assured its been addressed... the reason I've return to T-Mobile for the 2nd try, was because of your on the ground, front-line team members. Clone those kids! And Kindly, pass along my appreciation!  M. Sheehan

They promise everything at the store, then you get the billing.  Thsi is a mess, their contracts do not reflect the real costs.  I was assured that my new phone and ipad everything included for 125.00 per month, taxes will vary a bit.  I got my first bill of 283.00.  I called customer service spent 2 1/2 hours on the phone and tey promised to take care of it, they did not so I did not pay and they turned the phone off, I called back another 2 hours, they took what they call a late fee off, unacceptable.  I haven't gotten a 2nd bill yet, but my online account states 305.00, I'm still not paying.  They promise everything and deliver nothing.

If your considering T- mobile, I would look elsewhere. I signed up with the 4 months ago. I haven't got hardly any service lately with them. I told them and they just don't care. My mom is elderly with cancer and needs to get ahold of me if she needs to get ahold of me so i looked into a service provider who I know I could have good service so my mom could get ahold of me when she needed and t-mobile won't port my number over unless I pay them 400 which their saying my bill is this month but there's no pay when my bill is over 2 something a month and I just paid 169.00. My bill is different every month, anyways I have to pay 2,000 for each device plus 400 which I eont know where their getting that. I called them the other day and explained my situation and they told me yes I could change that they understood and that they would send me a remaining of my bill and I could just call a d set up a payment arrangement and I told the representative I was told that and she basically said oh well. DO NOT GO TO T-MOBILE, all they want is their money, they don't care about anything else!!!!!!!

I went into the T Mobile store in Fayetteville, Ga. today to get assistance with transferring information in my Samsung phone. I am 71 years old and not as savvy as the young people with computers but I do fairly well with my phone. the tech on duty did not listen to me when I told her my problem and I was told that older people " need to start learning how to do this stuff themselves" in a rude tone of voice. I told her sorry that I didn't want to bother her any longer. I drove to Riverdale ,Ga to the T Mobile store  where I was helped and treated with professionalism and courtesy. The later experience made up somewhat for the first experience but will not be returning to the Fayetteville location again

I went into a T Mobile store on 4000 West and around 4500 South in West Valley City, Utah.  I was immediately helped with some help on setting up a new phone and also helped me get a galaxy watch.  The two employees helped me for a long time to understand how the phone and galaxy watch worked.  Their names are Anderson and Jasmine.  I highly recommend this store to anyone needing a new phone or help with their equipment.

Let me start by saying that T-mobile has very spotty customer service. Sometimes, I cannot even access my account and for a few months, I was unable to even view a copy of my statement. When you owe them money for any reason (even if it is a day late), you get an automated message and it won't even transfer you to a person unless you pay. "Thank you for calling and have a nice day" Click!! 

 I called in November to have a line cancelled that was for a tablet that I donn't use anymore. Not only did the representative NOT cancel it, but told me that he would save the number in case I decided to use it again in the future. I asked if it was going to be showing up as a charge on my account and he assured me that it wouldn't and that it was just a hold, like he was doing me a favor. I ended up with a bigger charge on the next bill. When I called to talk to an "expert", I was not refunded the amount. T-mobile is not where I want to be, but my son is in a contract on his phone. I would definitely not suggest signing up with this company.

On nov/2022, I went to the store to change my phone at the time I was offered a FREE watch and FREE screen protector and case, I asked its for free, really? and was assured that was a promotion, Ok now I received my bill and EVERYTHING is being charged on my bill, I call T-Mobile and was completely dismissed,  I'm very frustrate being a old costumer didn't know T-mobile now is doing this kind of deceiving. Looking for another co asap.

I was with sprint and I didn’t have a choice of changing to T-Mobile when I was with Sprint they had a contract and I wanted to pay off my phone but by the time in the end of the contract they told me I couldn’t so I had at least my phone so many years I paid on the phone and they would not let me buy it now with T-Mobile They say they don’t have a so-called contract but if I pay off my phone early which I should be able to you still have to pay till the end of your billing so I can pay off my phone but I still have to pay for 18 more months that’s ridiculous. I would never go with T-mobile again ever if you’re smart by your phone outright, and do not get a contract. Do not sign anything with T-Mobile or Sprint  these totally take advantage of a person that doesn’t know they’re being taken advantage of !

I Switched From Metro by T-Mobile To T-Mobile For Phone Service And Home Internet.  Metro by T-Mobile Said I Couldn't Port My Number To T-Mobile For Another Month, So T-Mobile Said I Would Only Have To Pay $25.00 For My Home Internet Since I Wouldn't Be Allowed Netflix And Some Other Perks Since I Couldn't Port My Number Yet.  When I Finally Could Port My Number Over, And Did So, My Old Phone Blew Up (The Battery) So I Had To Purchase A New Phone From T-Mobile.  T-Mobile Had Told Me That My Bill For Home Internet And Phone Service Would Be $90.00 Per Month.  Before They Even Sent Me The Phone I Purchased For $199.47, They Took An Additional $115.00 Out Of My Bank Account And Said It Was For My Home Internet Service And Phone Service, Which I Haven't Even Recieved The Phone Yet.  They Charged Me For The Month That I Didn't Even Have Service With Them, And They Charged Me More Than They Stated I Would Be Paying, Then Wouldn't Put It Back In My Bank.  T-Mobile Sucks.  I'm Gonna Get A Lawyer.  I Finally Recieved A Phone From T-Mobile, And It Was Defective, Plus They Didn't Even Send Me A Sim Card For It, AND They Charged Me $65 Dollars For A Phone Service That They Told Me Was Only Going To Be $40 A Month Since I Ported My Number To Them And Bought Home Internet With Them For $50 A Month, So My Total Bill Was Supposed To Only Come To $90.  And They Will Not Refund My Money.  So, I Had To Pay Metro $50 For The Same Month That T-Mobile Is Charging Me $65, When I Didn't Even Have Service With T-Mobile, And Instead Of Refunding My Money, T-Mobile Said They Were Just Going To Apply It To My Next Bill....Even Though I Canceled Service With Them.  What Bill???  They Are The Scum Of The Earth.  I Intend To Pursue Them In Court, Or The Gates Of Hell, Whichever Comes First.
November 2022 New Phone Service Only $35. December Phone Bill $55. Happy New Year & New Bill $78. I Am A Senior On A Fix Income & Not Expecting This High Rates.. I Am Not Satisfied With The Carrier.

T-Mobile, only if you have no other choice!!!!
I got T-Mobile because I was finally tired of Metro, Boost. The worse choice ever.  Nate, the store representative,  is extremely polite. However,  he neglected to inform me of many things that could've prevented me from having to make another trip to the store,  and saved me from several phone calls to his store and TMOBILE. I spent over $200, and now find out that I have to pay another $134 in 21 days? The company will also have you do all the work for any adds- ons or benefits.  I will have to go online to try to make payment arrangements for first month, 
because the TMobile representative on the phone didn't want to help.   Beware,  because you won't be told this,  that the cell phones no longer come with the charger box for your phone.  And you can not just use any charger box.  SMH. TMobile is not the company you want.  The internet lags on my phone,  and the tablet that is supposed to come with internet for $10 a month,  big NO. it has no internet at all.  TMOBILE is taking over,  so the end result will eventually be the same for all,  we're gonna get over charged, low quality service from the representatives,  as well as the actual phone service.  I think that maybe I'm gonna go back to smoke signals like in the good old old days.  TMOBILE isn't the worst,  but you would be better with Sprint,  Verizon, AT&T, or cricket.  
You've been warned.

We started with T-Mobile in 2018. Back then the service was amazing. Customer service was prompt and the CEO back then seemed right on top of things. However, after the CEO moved on, it seems like things have kind of fallen a bit… Customer service became hit or miss, home internet was offered to me, but then rescinded without me even being contacted, and the local stores in my area became not as competent as before. We recently moved service to Verizon.

The installation in itself was not complicated however during peak and off peak time we experienced massive slow down and could not stream. Very frustrating trying to watch a bears game from the sling app the screen froze and trying to watch a movie was absolutely impossible.  I would say the screen froze more than 35 times of which some were lengthy pauses before the internet came back on. Sorry tmobil I have no complaints on our cell service, but you need to do some fine tuning on the crap internet your passing off to your consumers. Will be canceling your internet.
Horrible. Been trying to get my phones that I paid for unlock for two months now and they carrying me around the bushes. Lied, unprofessional, and not knowledgeable customer service agents.

Obviously did not have enough incentive for employees to work New Years eve. when I needed help I was put in a queue and told my estimated wait time was 13 minutes. An hour and 5 minutes later someone picked up and immediately hung up without saying a word. Never got a call back and had to start process all over. Infuriating to say the least.

Sold me an electronic brick.  A tablet that doesn't work and I can't use.  Also there is a monthly service fee of $45 a month for something I can not access nor use.
Won't accept a return even within their 14 day window.
Looks like I'll have to drop off the product at the store, not pay my existing bill and move both my company and personal numbers elsewhere.

T-Mobile:  Why waste my time by sending what appeared to be a great offer for unlimited talk, text and data, a FREE smartphone PLUS "Fast. Affordable. 5G Internet." at a locked in price of $50 if there is no service available in my neighborhood...the exact same neighborhood where you sent the offer.  Very poor business model.

Went into the store to purchase the iPhone 14 plus for my daughter's Christmas gift. The guy mentioned tmobile offered free shipping, after physically handing him the address for it to be shipped to, he still manged to enter the whole street name incorrectly. So here we are 1 week later with no phone, and tmobiles advice was maybe I should contact ups. I thought the whole point of offering free shipping was so the customer didnt have to worry about it😂 After being with tmobile for almost 12 years, I will very soon be switching to AT&T.

Can't ever hire enough people to handle the volume of calls.  I've been on hold for 11/2 hours to report that I have received yet another letter from yet another doctor not being able to reach us on our T-Mobile line!  The doctors and I am trying to keep my husband alive but you aren't helping!  You are a utility and you need to function 24/7!  Where's my government to get a leash on your disfunctionality?  Regulatory capture?  The date is constant.  Until they bother to generate correspondence I have no way to know.

I ordered a 14 pro max but instead they sent me the 14 plus and I’m sure it’s because the lady could barely speak a lick of English. The supervisor did not help and then tried to make me come off of some more money from a mistake that they made on their end! I’m changing services asap!
So tired of the bad T-Mobile internet service. They constant make excuses for their terrible service. Wish I never switched over. 100% nightmare.

I had an issue with my Sprint phone and went into a T-Mobile store for a replacement.

They talked me into a basic iPhone and a basic T-Mobile plan. I just needed something simple w/out any bells and whistles.

Months later I looked at my bank account and found that my auto pay was almost double what I had agreed to in store. I went to the store to resolve this and the manager was outside and the sales clerk I originally worked with was not on duty. 

The sales team was aloof. I told them my concerns about my plan. They tried to up-sell me. They told me that I was on the cheapest plan available. When I insisted that I was shown a different plan when I signed up the conversation turned belligerent. The told me that the GM did not have an contact info or business cards. What!?!

Then they told me that there was no district manager assigned due to the merger. I left....

The central customer service was not much more help...
My account was in limbo between Sprint and TMobile for months and months, so it was impossible to log into either or get support from one or the other because one could not see the others account artifacts. It was a complete disaster!

I finally got some help from the customer service number today, but they could only make changes going forward now that my account was finally fully migrated. 

Sooo......

- Turns out the store was using dishonest practices, the bait and switch. Pitching the promo and then entering something different into the system.

-the store clearly covers the practice

-management has no accountability or oversight into issues.

-Corporate has no oversight or visibility to correct issues.
 
-The corporate merger left customers vulnerable and at the mercy incomplete operation, poor in-store service, untrained and unprofessional staff and 3rd party agents.

Deals that don't work!
Tmobile sales engaged me in buying 2 lines and 2 phones for a supposedly good deal. They did not advise me that the extra-free phone would not work with my computer
When I realized I could not use the extra phone line-text , I cancelled that line. Because I cancelled that line  I was forced to pay 300 dollars for the supposedly free phone . Imagine!

I cannot believe that a major cell phone company can get away with the most poor, destructive business practices I have ever seen in my life. I opened an account with them for a $25 per month plan, as a secondary phone number for my business. I do not use the phone and don't plan to, as I just need it to make about 10 calls per month from home on wifi. Every single month I get a bill for over $80. And every single month I've had to call in and waste over 90 minutes explaining why the bill is wrong, and the month prior the rep fixed it and said it wouldn't happen again, and then it happens again each month. I do not have that time or energy to spare with the worst, most uninformed, untrained, dishonest customer support reps I've ever experienced. This company is so irresponsible and it is unethical for T-Mobile to be able to take social security numbers from public consumers and mishandle them and everything about that privilege in the manner they do. I am seriously looking into suing them if it is even possible, or at the very least writing up a serious complaint to the FCC. I am definitely cutting the phone line off today, and they are giving me a hard time doing that as well. The support agent just promised me that my bill will be correct next month and she can take $20 off for the late fees & reconnection fees. Unbelievable. They are really crazy. The CEOs and owners need to burn for what they are doing to the public, and only God knows what else they are doing to those offshore reps who do not know anything about solving billing issues with people like me who were stupid enough to open an account with them. Every month I have to tussle for over an hour with a disorganized, uninformed, incapable person from a different country, culture and native language and they lie every time. They even lie about their names - giving out fake American names as if that will solve the horrible dysfunction of these phone calls being off shore by this greedy, corrupt company. Imagine having to instruct each support person to please look at previous month's notes because they never think to do it on their own. What a stressful tyrannical experience. Please, stay far away from this company. This is not an exaggeration. The reps blatantly lie, pretend to be typing, lie and say hold on I'll get a supervisor, but return to the phone and it is still the same person pretending to be the supervisor. It is just unbelievable. Something is really wrong with T-Mobile's company. I just closed this account with a balance of $68 that I do not owe. Incredible. A waste of 4 months.

I signed up with T-Mobile over the phone (landline). After 6 months of being a T-Mobile customer, I decided the $85 plan was more than I needed. So I went on-line and made the change directly from their website to the more modest $60 plan. Their website confirmed the change would take effect the following month, it did not. I called customer support, and after giving my info was told they could not help me as my social security number was incorrect. I went to one of their physical locations (drivers license and current passport in hand) to clear up the social security error and change my monthly plan (as instructed by customer support). To my surprise, the following month my statement came in at $85, again. Once again I called customer service, and again was told. They could not assist me as my social security number was incorrect. And that I needed to go to one of their physical locations to clear up the ID issue and change phone plans.
This company is an exercise in futility.
E. Galbo

Got the home internet device under a free promotion. Turns out it was the biggest scam ever. Not only did the device not work but the company would charge me for something they said was free and I could not cancel this horrible deal. I had to go to the store in-person, 4 days straight before I got it cancelled. Even then, the company keeps sending me a bill like I owed them anything.

The worst customer service ever. They charged me for an account I didn’t have sent the info to a debt collector possibly ruining my excellent credit. I cannot get them to return my money..They had me on the phone for hours only to be disconnected every time.
Terrible

If I could not give them a star at all I would. I became a customer back in September. I was told my bill would be 112.59. Every month I have to call after receiving a text reminding that my bill is coming due and it always says 140.74. Every month I have had to call customer service which is always a engthy call, to have them "fix" the issue. Every representative I have spoken to, says the issue is resolved and moving forward your bill will be correct. Each month I have to call back, because the issue has NOT been resolved. This last representative tells me that the correct bill amount ISN'T 112.59, that it's actually 122.74. I know that this is a small difference but at this point it's the principle. Before becoming a customer I had heard great things about them. I am VERY disappointed that I was not lucky enough to have had this so called "great experience." I was with Verizon for 20 years, I am now having huge regrets switching. I would end my service with T-Mobile TODAY, if doing so didn't result in getting screwed even more, costing me the full price for my devices. So now I am stuck with my awful decision. Best believe when my contract is up I WONT be renewing my contract. These two years can't go by fast enough! I do not look forward to dealing with customer service for the remainder of my contract. If you are thinking of switching to T-Mobile, I strongly advise against it! Do so at your own risk of disappointed and frustration!

Was for Sprint merged with T-Mobile. They told us to get an extra line for free and get a half off phone pay $90 a month plus the charge for the half off extra phone. Instead, when Sprint merge with T-Mobile they charged us $50 for each line and now that I want to leave they want to hold me accountable for the half off phone discount even though they won’t be held accountable for the contract they offered me for the two wines and the third for free, I’ll take it up with the store. I’ve taken it out with the phone calls and no one has helped me and they don’t give a shitake mushroom about you.

I have all screenshots to prove the following. On 11/06/2022 Iadded a line and phone through Tmobile app. The agreement atthe order review was $20 for the line and $5 for the phone afterthe promotion they offered me. Once the first bill came in with nopromotion and the phone at the full price of $16.67, I reached outto support on the app on 12/01/22 and he stated "It shows yourgalaxy A71 5g is well qualified for our device credit which shouldreflect in 1-2 billing cycles" "I guarantee you that its alreadyenrolled now to your device without a problem" Okay noproblem, but then I get the following months bill with the phonestill at full price. I reach back out to support and now they aresaying that pormotion is no longer avalible and that it was for achromebook? I called in to speak to someone and they said thatpromotion was for business customers only? Okay it is not myfault your app offered me that promotion and sold me on a lowerprice. This is not the first time tmobile has done this to me. I really feel like they are robbing me and tricking customer into gettingphone plans and keeping them longer.... by the way I have been aclient for 10 years now.

Negative 10, was sold a bad S22. I had to travel for 3 months, the day I returned I went to TMobile, they checked and it had a bunch of issues, I was issued a refurbished phone. That stopped working in less than a month. So in 4 months I had gone through 2 phones and was going to get a 3rd phone but, I’m paying for a brand new S22. The whole TMobile store and customer service reps, including Asurion, the insurance company used by TMbobile agreed that the right thing to do was give me a brand new phone, same phone. I wasn’t trying to upgrade or anything I wanted a working S22 phone. Both phones had charging issues and I could only use wireless charging. That’s stupid, I travel intensely for work, how am I going to wirelessly charge on a flight, second, the phone doesn’t even come with that charger so it’s not the norm. Wasted 2-3 days on the phone going from one person to the next, went through an extensive verification process each time and one rep said your account is on the high internet user, I said to her respectfully, my primary concern is the phone doesn’t work I need that sorted then she said well I wouldn’t be a good customer service rep if I didn’t tell you. Can you imagine! Resolution given was I buy a brand new phone and pay off the 3rd refurbished phone they were adamant to give me. I was told by a manager that TMobile is not responsible for phones, their just a carrier, SO WHH ARE YOU SELLING PHONES IN YOUR STORE???? I’ve noticed some of these businesses makeup rules and policies only explainable to a mentally challenged person, they forget customers are highly educated too, business leaders and owners and BS is BS and their man made rules are rubbish, given little end to end thought and probably didn’t think thru all pertinent scenarios before it was passed around and signed off. If your own employees tell you their policy is BS and bad for the honest customer, you know it’s bad. Use logic TMobile.

Excellent customer service horrible service provider. Over the last month internet and data service evaporated with 21% downtime accredited to maintenance. In a month the could erect an entirely new tower. The poor people fielding phone calls and trying to provide tech help are at the mercy of the shoddy work of the impotence of those in the field. Never been more disappointed. If you are looking for something reliable, then look elsewhere.

I have been a long time customer of T-Mobile I wanted to purchase the new Samsung flip 4 And I was seeking the best price possible I seen it was on sale at Best Buy for $300 less than T-Mobile call T-Mobile and told them that and they said since I was a long-term customer that they would honor the $300 off But I had to pay the full price and they in turn would refund it to my form of payment also was told that air buds would come free that was a lie as well they charge my American Express and I never did receive the air buds it took them almost 3 weeks I don’t know why the only tell me OK we’re going to refund it to your American Express that’s only for the item I did not receive the rest of the credit would have to go in a form of future credits toward my bill which I am not satisfied with because I didn’t need a $300 credit over three months totally ridiculous I was told over and over again they would refund it in a form of cash back in my bank account which I gave them my bank account number for times only to be told they could not do it this is a very misleading practice they do not tell you the truth just lies I had to keep calling keep calling and still ain’t got nothing done I was they say is there sorry that I was misinformed being a client over 15+ years this is not right I spent over 5 1/2 hours of my time with these people on the phone and they gave me a additional credit for $25 for all my time wow I make over $200 an hour do I need a $25 credit we were people if you’re going to pay for your stuff out right you’re better off going somewhere else and not Buying from T-Mobile heed the warning

12/28 at around 8:15pm. Just want to let you know that the customer service I
I received was just Fantastic. I just wanted to let you know ☺️ the individual was experienced and was very helpful in straightening out my bill that I was VERY VERY NOT HAPPY with when I went online to see my Bill. Keep up the Good work with your experience workers. Thank you 👍 keep up the 😊 Good work!!

They offer family plans cheaper than what we are paying. We were grandfathered in from Sprint were we were very happy and despite several calls and promises to call us back, nothing. We are currently researching other carriers. If you can avoid T Mobile I definitely would.

I really hate t-mobile with every single fiber of my being. Recently, tmobile forcibly migrated my Sprint account over to the dark side, that is otherwise known as t-mobile. My latest gripe with this Sprint-t-mobile merger, and that recent forcible migration of my Sprint account is that the autopay date changed from the third of the month to the first of the month. The problem is that I get paid direct deposit on the third of the month, not the first. This is an inconvenience to me, as I won't have any funds in my account on January 1, 2023 due to my payment went to Sprint on December 3, 2022. This is paying twice in the same month. I have a budget system set in place, and this short notice migration offsets my budget. There needs to be tons of class action lawsuits filed against tmobile, so that tmobile can be put out of business, as it should be, and fall to the wayside as it will be doing everybody a great big huge favor by sparing everybody from headaches and the misery tmobile spreads with their ghastly magenta bling.

I would say peace of crap company t mobile i lost my $140 within 😢 one which is restocking fee all customers service fraud they want just their commission they don't tell you reality they mislead to customers i hate T mobile peace of crsp company for ever .
Took me over 5 hrs either in store or on the phone to simply port-in a phone number from another company. After 9 years, I am very close to switching company.
Jordan W need a fantastic job with our problem in the Sammamish store !He took his time to answer all our questions . Great job Jordan.

If I could give them a negative 10 stars I certainly would.
Traded two IPhone 12’s in on IPhone 14 Pro Max’s. Was told by local store we would receive $800 in promotional credits per phone. 3 months later our bill is still almost $100 higher because they refuse to honor the promotion. Have tried to resolve this with various T-Mobile “experts” but get the same lies and false assurances that the credits will be applied. Latest “expert” says the promotion was not valid. Gonna get our attorney to take them to the mat.
worst customer support. if you don't know your job, ask for help before giving information to customers.

T-Mobile has to be the worst service I've ever dealt with in my life they're supposed to be open at 6:00 a.m. at 6:04 a.m. I keep calling there's no technician to help me I paid my bill yesterday after it was shut off after being a couple hours late they told me it would be turned back on in an hour it has been over 15 hours and still not turned on I was approved for the ACP program I contacted the store four times and they told me they would not help me they told me to contact the customer service I contacted them I had to contact them five different times then they gave me a different number to contact I contacted them they told me that it's T-Mobile that has to set it up I got stage for lymphoma last year and was told I would have one to three weeks to live so unfortunately I've been unable to work and I just need to have home service no one seeing wants to want to help me I had to pay to get my service turned back on my box has went off at least 30 times in the past 3 weeks that I've had it we had to reset the box turn it back on and taste at least 15 minutes each time this is the worst service I've ever dealt with I do not recommend them to anyone at all did you not want to help in the stores they do not want to help on customer service they don't want to help all!!!! I do not recommend them to anyone again I will say that think twice before you deal with them I dealt with Comcast before they were a pain in the butt to actually get help technically but I never had any problem with my service their Wi-Fi was amazing and it's actually worth the money have a great holiday

T-Moblie lied about everything.  I signed up for a new iPhone with unlimited data and 100 GB hotspot.  The iPhone came with 40 gb hotspot.  Then they changed the plan on my Alcatel Linkzone hotspot without my consent.  My Linkzone stopped working.  Then the “free” tablet, has a 15 per month charge.  I returned the tablet which cost $20 to return.  Don’t ever accept anything free!  Ever!  These people are out to steal from you.

Tmobile is by far has the worst customer service known to man. I have been trying to get my $1,000 credit applied that they offered me to upgrade to iphone 13  from Sept 3rd. We are now at Christmas. These careless representatives blatantly lie with promises that the credit was approved and will be applied every time I call. Meanwhile I have been over charged for my $74 with tax plan, for 3 consecutive months. They billed me at $211, $177, and $204. I have been extremely patient with these dimwitted people for the past 4 months. Not to mention the back and forth regarding the blank return labels, that I was concerned about and following their reasurance, the 2 returned devices that they claim they never received or couldnt locate. On top of the claimed free roaming in Canada, that I got charged $100 for. I have no more patience in me. 
Please someone tell me how to get someone at Tmobile to actually do their job? They don't want to let me talk to a superviser. They just leave me on hold and pass me around to different unrelated departments like the sales department for an upgrade. What?!!!! I can't. I'm really about to burst. Is there anyway to get a hold of a supervisor, or corporate, or anyone who could influence them to correct the matter?

I want to say, I've been with TMOBILE for over 15yrs.
Since their recent merger, their service has plummeted to a 1-star at best. The reps give you any story they can make up. They make guarantees and don't follow thru. They take order for phone & explain a contract for you to sign will immediately be emailed to you. I called at noon next day - WHEN I STILL HAD NOT RECEIVED IT.  When you call back - the next rep says "you were given wrong" information. So the express shipment on new phone - the $15 they were to charge for it/with a 2-day guarantee of arrival, was removed and now no one can say when it will arrive. On my 2nd call, the rep stated the $15 "express shipping charge" is the cost from Amazon.  IM LIKE WHAT??? WHO THE HECK IS TALKING ABOUT AMAZON? I DONT GIVE A HOOT ABOUT AMAZON/I NEVER EVEN BROUGHT THEM UP!!! 
Im talking TO TMOBILE, the cost i was given IS FROM YESTERDAYS REP AT TMOBILE!!! So, why did she even bring that bogus comment up???
After a 4th call to resolve this in less than 24hrs-in one breath the rep states they don't even have said phone in stock/so no idea when it will be shipped. In 5 minutes later, when I said I want to cancel order - - he states " well, we can't cancel order - because phone has already been sent to UPS for delivery...but we won't have a tracking number til after 7pm/or perhaps in the next morning". (Now hadn't he just stated : there aren't any even in stock "yet"???)
It's like they make up lies as they go. Not one of them can tell the truth!!!
Meanwhile in less than 24hrs- they have already deducted my bank acct of the funds!!!
Tmobile seem to be more scam artists! Not only THAT, but rarely is there an English/American answering for Customer Sevice, and speak distinctly. 
(Yet here we are told we have "preferential C/S since weve been a member for so long.) Now, since we can't cancel order, and I have repeatedly told them after Friday I will be out of town (with no way to retrieve a UPS shipment, and they informed me in that case they will return it to Tmobile.) I've inquired about being forced to pay a "restocking fee". The rep stated NO - I will not be charged a restocking fee. LETS SEE IF THAT IS A LIE OR TRUTH... COME NEXT WEEK. 
Finally - I do look at the texts that are sent after you've hung up with the reps. Where they say how great it was to be able to help you. And they sign their name.
Here's another "lie". I spoke of girl who took initial order. Shared she sent a thank you texted with her signed name. Interesting in my text it states her name was JANET. Yet the last 2 reps claims it was someone named CHERIE. 
Ain't that interesting!!! So she's lying about her name, as well???
It's like I'm being forced to take my business elsewhere since I can't get truth out of ANY of them!!  I hate Tmobile anymore.
   Last time (2mo ago) I tried to reduce my phone bill & get on another "program", I was told it'd either be $6 cheaper/with added benefits, or about the same. THE REALITY WAS - I WAS CHARGED OVER $30 MORE ON NEXT BILL CYCLE!!!
WHERE was the honesty in all THAT!!??
Does anyone else see a problem repeating itself here with Tmobile??

With the help of Apple, I was able to confirm that my device which was purchased in new condition from eBay and later marked as stolen was first “sold” at a physical TMobile location after the device 3 days after was already in possession of USPS and sent to my house. TMobile was able to confirm this, essentially confirming that I was defrauded by or with the assistance of a TMobile employee. Despite this, they offered 0 resolution. Refused to unblock the phone, and offered me to purchase another device at full retail value.

Our phone and internet are with T-Mobile and we have been having issues with it dropping multiple times an hour since Friday. After multiple calls getting dropped when talking with them they assure us there isn't anything showing up as a problem. 

Each time we called they want to restart the trouble shooting the phone rather than admit it could be an issue on their end. 

They finally stopped trying to say it was the devices when I mentioned my neighbors are also having issues and that I didn't when I was using my phone in a different area. The response is just to wait for a call at the end of the week.

I don't see how a call is going to fix the issue since it is very possible we won't even be able to get the call

Absolutely deplorable! 3 days more than 4 hours on the phone trying to return products. More circles than the Olympics symbols. I hate Tmobile and will never use them again. You want US dollars but refuse to provide US support.

I have home internet. My first device was faulty so they sent me a new one.  I returned the old one but was still billed $243 for it even though they told me it would be no charge.  Their home internet isn't even that good, and now I've had to pay for two devices in less than 6 months.  After multiple phone calls they are still looking into it and won't remove the charges.

If I could pick zero stars, I would. It took 12 hours and 44 minutes to have a phone transferred to my account.  The person at the store had only been at the store for two weeks. His assistant manager that is helping to be promoted to manager of the store was out today with female problems. Monsoons started on Friday and ended on Monday night. I spent way over the time I had expected these children at the stores, and had no idea what they were doing. My sales person if you call them that I don’t know if that’s a rule is hard to call his manager and moved on adding 10 phones to one account.  
The salesman or whatever they’re called in the T-Mobile stores failed me and the other guy he was multitasking with. Another day and I went home and my phone that I added to my account still did not work. The kid that I worked with told me the manager or whoever he is has six stores of tea mobile that he hast to manage. I saw people coming and going and I kept chilling. Do you have to know your AT&T page is a pin you have to know your Apple pen you have to know your clothes pin you have to know your diaper pin. You have to know your brain pin you have to know your toenail pin you have to know your, will you get my picture these kids in the stores don’t know what they’re doing and no one is training them and the turnover rate is oh my God well let’s just say probably every two weeks new person and they don’t know what they’re doing. When I heard the young man call the manager of six doors and be on the phone with him for an hour and a half trying to get 10 phones from a man who has a large family and his  phone numbers added to his new account I was flabbergasted. I saw so many people come in and I said hey I’m on my fourth hour. People turned around and walked out the dirties quickie door. No one is in charge of the store. We’re probably this company. I thought teen mobile , who is work adding my friends phone to my account since we live together this is been the worst. I can’t tell you how many times the worst experience I have ever had with a telecommunications company where the hell is the president or CEO. He should know these processes are stupid , the gentleman that had to add 10 phones to history account had to be approved by T-Mobile for credit purposes that call cost that man an hour and a half because no one could understand what was needed to get his credit approved. How pitiful. He finally left after the sales person on whatever you wanna call this person in the store keep scanning and scanning and scan it and scan you get skinny in on the phone with his boss because his assistant manager was out  too young men in this store in San Ramon California what a shame what a horrible shame who is the district manager who is a regional major who is the president everyone has filled this door. I started my process on Friday night and ended it on Monday night I was to the point where I wanted to throw that new damn phone at the wall because when I return the phone did not work and I called the store and told them my phone did not work. I was on the phone with the store for another hour and 10 minutes asking why does one phone does not work. No one can call me or text me. When I left the store, I was sure you’ll be hooked up with the tea mobile net work in about 20 minutes, why didn’t it happen right away. No one is in charge of this company. He would think the president of the regional or local managers would no.  This company needs someone to outline the processes once a person introduces store. They just say this is what you need for what you want. What they do is start the process is all you need this and I say I don’t have it. Oh, you have to come back. I come back and we get going and they say oh you need this is different from what you gave us that. I said OK I will come back tomorrow third day I have to call the Philippines and they keep me on hold for hour and 45 minutes and then they say oh I will call you tomorrow. What time will be good. They said because AT&T will not release the phone number to T mobile. I told them you can call me at 9 AM the next day. I wait and no call will come in. I am so frustrated. I want to reverse everything on T mobile but it’s too late. These morons that are running this company have no idea they’re running it into the ground. Where are the shareholders they should be knocking on the door of the president vice president anyone in the office I am so mad at the way this whole operations T Mobil has gone

Don’t use them. When a company has a less than 2 rating you know you are dealing with a bunch of losers. My Dad passed away and I wanted to disconnect his phone. Called customer service and was promptly told I needed to take the paperwork to a branch office. Which I did the same day. After showing the rep the paperwork, they called the same customer service that sent me to the retail store. Now these jerks want to schedule a call 8 days later to give me instructions on how to get his phone disconnected. Nothing but a circle jerk to try to get more money for their crappy service. I wouldn’t use these clowns if they were the only phone service in the world.

The worst experience I have ever had with a cellular company. I started with business internet that took months to disconnect, the quality was poor and getting to anyone who could disconnect the service was a nightmare, easy to start but to end I was given the complete run around, do this, do that, call here, go here. T-mobile has numerous telephone numbers when asking someone to give you a direct number to a department they don't have it, know it either. Lets talk about cellphone service it took 45 minutes & two people to do a transfer of ownership and they saturate you with compliments, appreciation, fluff. You can tell the people they have working for them do not know a thing, they can not answer simple questions they read back to you everything you say and reiterate themselves, you feel dumb by the time the call is over. I would not associate with them at all and they should not be in business.

If I could leave 0, I would, I was with tmobile for many years then I decided to switch to a company with a better deal, but I still left only one line with tmobile, they took away my online access despite still having a line with them, they just made me charges without giving me telephone access to call and ask about those invoices and when I finally could  speak with someone from customer service, they just told me that they did not know what those amounts were and that they could only take the payment, that they were not authorized to send me any invoice to my email detailing the charges. They have made it totally unlikely that I would want to return to that company ever again.

Omg I could write a chapter book about Tmobile services I am currently sitting on the phone with them right now and the fact that I have been waiting on hold for way over 5 minutes to speak to a supervisor makes no sense all because the damn customer service rep can't explain information right. Ask him one question he says yes your paying for your watch but no your not paying for the watch and then turns around and sits on the phone for a dumb ass long time and says nothing you just sit in silence and if I say hello he says nothing then says hello everytime I say imma just hang up. I don't know if the man was just ignoring me or completely doing something else but it was the worst service I ever had. 2 weeks ago I called same service like I don't know but there service is becoming the worst I ever seen. I been with them for a few years now and I'm beyond it now I will be looking for new plans in then morning.

Very disappointed  in everything poor service all the time internet in and out  worst cell phone service experience  i ve had metro was wa u better which doesnt make sense cause there owned by t mobile dont give t mobile your money you get nothing in return but no service.

This company is just terrible. I called in to the T-Mobile for Business service number because I was looking to upgrade my phone. I have been a customer for many years and they didn’t even consider letting me keep the plan and refused to pay for the phone outright even though they said they would and would call me back on that Tuesday. I changed to Verizon the same-day because I knew they weren’t going to call me back. They need to learn how to treat business customers. By the way, if you were wondering, Verizon service is much better than T-Mobile’s.

Paid 3 months in advance for month to month service. lost my tablet a week later. 6 months later I get a notice from T Mobil that I owe them $117.00! Oh really! What genuine scum! They started sending me letters about harm to my credit and how they'd send their fake debt to a collections agency. T-Mobil is truly evil. Have gone with Mint Mobil and have had no problems.

If I could leave less than 1 star, I would. I signed up for internet for 50/150 gigabytes for 29 days. I used 172 gigabytes and paid $295.00. The problem was I turned in the box at store and they couldn’t cancel account and told to call 800 number customer service and every representative said needed to go to store. It seems these people need more training. Do not recommend T-mobile internet.

T-mobile says unlimited data not true. I do not have wifi and they told me it is limited to always keep my wifi on. So my phone doesn't work after like 10 days until 30th day when I pay and get more data. NEVER SIGN A CONTRACT WITH T-MOBILE. GET ANOTHER SERVICE UNLESS YOU HAVE UNLIMITED WIFI

T-Mobile needs to promote their Trustpilot, it’s a shame it’s filled with such negative reviews. I’ve had nothing but great experiences with T-Mobile USA. I’ve been a customer for close to 14 years now. My family of 4 is on the Magenta Military Max plan. We have a free 4th line, so we pay next to nothing per line. We’ve all used our phone service for free while roaming internationally, it has been a life saver. We’ve also all used the free in-flight WiFi. Most recently I flew to Ireland and had free WiFi from T-Mobile for the whole flight over the Atlantic! I personally believe T-Mobile has the best phone plan currently available on the postpaid market, and has had the best plan for nearly a decade now!

I bought the pixel 7 pro almost 2 months ago with free pixel buds pro included. T mobile promised the earbuds would arrive within 6 weeks. They also indicated that they would arrive before my trip. I chose to buy from them since it would include noise canceling earbuds which i now can not use. After 8 weeks t mobile did not even give me any indication when it will be shipped.

Horrible! I bought a phone and paid cash when I was on the Tmobile network and they refuse to unlock the phone. I am in another country and I've been trying to get them to unlock it for 4 days now! They have no reason to keep it locked. My $1200 phone is useless right now because of Tmobile. Horrible!!!!

In the earlier days (maybe about 7-10 years ago), T-mobile wasn't this bad. The service in the last few years has been SO bad. They always start out with saying that they will for sure fix your issues. If you hear that you already know you are doomed. After talking with a clueless rep for an hour a supervisor will take over, and after wasting another hour or two will assure that it will be escalated appropriately and that someone will call you back. IT NEVER HAPPENS.

I had a grandfathered promotion (FREE 200 MEGS FOR LIFE) that was showing as expiring on my account online. I contacted them several times, each time they assured that it was a simple system glitch and not to worry about it. After it disappeared, they then said not to worry and that it would be restored. Then, it was already restored they said but not reflected yet on the account, just wait. The latest story is that it was never on the account OR it can't be applied anymore.

That was just one of several problems that reached no resolution.There was a time when Tmobile was great with their phone promotions. But back then their billing system was horrendous. But at least people would try to fix your problems. These days the billing system is better, but if there are ANY issues you're up a creek.

It seems as though T-mobile has gone way down hill since joining with Sprint.  I have been a T=Mobile customer for 21 years and had generally been pleased.  Recently, I have found customer service poor and when trying to get some sort of upgrade to compete with what is being offered by others they were of little assistance.  The last time I spoke with them, they were going to have a supervisor contact me within an hour.  Two days later I had heard nothing and changed my service to another carrier.  21 years and it seems as though they had no interest in doing anything for someone who had been a very loyal customer.

Where is the option for no stars? T-Mobile is the biggest scam ever! I highly suggest anyone who thinks about joining their network to look into the definition of unlimited! Because they don't just slow you down they shut you off! You will not even have slowed down internet! It will just not work at all unless your on WIFI! Also you will have extra ordinary hard time sending text and making phone calls! Your the poorest Excuse for a phone company there is! I cannot wait to FIRE YOU FOREVER! In closing I would say I've had lots of unlimited plans Never did they Limit Me Except T-mobile! That's why they are truly the WORST!

Please see my Google review. FLOYD is my screen name. The Madison store has a rogue CSR named Nathan. I realize help is hard to find after Covid, but they're REALLY scraping the bottom of the barrel with this CSR wannabe. I flat out, BOLD FACED,  LIED to me and my daughter about the value of her trade in. I asked him 3 times if he was sure the credit he quoted, He even had the nerve to say, " you know where I work". He said $500.00 was correct and he SWORE it was, so I made the deal. My bill arrived and it only showed a $400.00 credit. This kid looks like a Walmart employee with visible tattoos, nose and lip piercings, etc. but I don't like to be judgemental so I gave him the benefit of the doubt. OH HOW I REGRET it. He is a bold faced liar who misrepresented my trade in amount to make a sale. I'm filing a complaint with the Better Business Bureau and called Tmobile corporate and gave them his name and employee number. If you go there,  let Rod take care of your transaction. I would have but he wasn't there. Nathan needs to be terminated for lying to a customer.

T -Mobil is full of *****. They only good when they sell you new plans or service.  When you call to cancel you will be surprise with how much fee you will face. It will blow your mind. think again before you deal with T-mobil !!!!!!!

I was in town and needed to visit the T-Mobile in Jefferson City Missouri.  I had the pleasure of being serviced by Eriana and Jharyld.  They were extremely professional and courteous.  What warmed my heart was the patience and kindness they treated   3 different elderly customers who each had their special challenges.  My mother is 79 and I know how I want her to be treated.  They both deserve special recognition  and a raise!

As a customer I had the worst experience ever with this company. No one ever manipulated me like them. Literally!
Anyone from Europe visiting the US, stay away from this provider! You will pay for the service, you won't get the service and then they will make you go from one office to another, to call customer service several times and in the end, you will get promised a refund and that refund you will never get. 
They are playing the game, customer service says one thing, employees in the office another. Of course, the idea behind this is to make you give up from your requests.
Don’t switch don’t do it!!! Customer Service is horrible, switching back to Verizon!!

I can't believe how low this company goes. 
I called 7 times on the same issue, (NO OFFENCE) all the customer service are picking up the phone from: Philipine, Hindi, Malesia etc., It's very hard to understand them, and opposite, they don't understand you. I called to ask why my new watch 5pro is not connected to my phone. I'm waiting 40 min. than they "drop" the call, I called again, they start to talk about phone numbers, I said it's not the reason that i called about, they drop the call. at the last one that I decided to speak with Super Visor, they told me "I have to give them a reason", I said for feedback, it wasn't enough for her, het put me on hold an 1 hr and 12 min. at the end he dropped the call. I decided no more! and leave the company. AWFUL!  I have screen shot and recording if someone does not believe me.

They are promoting their home interent and say they won't charge you for a 14 day trial. We used it for less than 24 hours. I didn't return it the next day but did return it before the 14 days were up. They charged me anyway. This also happened to my mom and dad. Customer service was no help. Next complaint is going to FTC. The internet speed depends on your area. My area does not have unlimited, websites take forever to load, and again customer service was no help.

This company is trash they slow down you internet now I’m trying to download a app I’m waiting like a one hour. Their internet is really bad. You will need extra internet home provider because if you use too much his service you don’t will be able to access internet properly. In these days that we use a lot of data in watching YouTube Netflix and more if you only have a phone with internet you will have a poor experience. Always you will need a extra internet provider because only 50gigas is nothing. What happened with the 5G propaganda all was a totally lie . Is better just get a little plan and get another provider for internet .

I am a T-Mobile customer since 2013, I saw on their website a advertisement for Home internet $25.00 per month,
I called last Friday 12.09.22  And asked them about it and they said yes, My bill would be been just $25 more. I told them that I was a longterm customer,  It still said it would be on the 25A month, That is a lie existing customer has to pay $50 a month for their Internet service, you have to be new customer.  That is quite disgusting they should try to keep the old customers happy but obviously I will have to switch to a trust worty Internet service,  Where they don't lie to the customers.

edits.text: The online supposedly experts a Emmanuel was lying to me telling me International calls are pro rated that was a complete lie you get charged for the whole month whether you need it only one day or the whole month. Also the customer service is reading from a script and the talk and talk and talk and don't get anything done.
The tech support 611 is horrible they keep reading from a script and talk and talk and talk and talk and get nothing done, they don't have experience people, that's the problem and I am sick of them.

I just bought my phone a week ago and now it's throbbing calls or I cannot call out, i rebooted still a problem and when I called customer service this morning it is Sunday 4 25 2021 at 7:20AM I ll only get the recording and nobody else picks up.

text: Arian @ T-Mobile was by far the most helpful and patient king of all times. He helped us to much and listened to our technical issues. Great experience. Not a lot of representatives are like him. He’s one of a kind.

THE WORST SERVICE POSSIBLE. They are rude and could care less about their customers. After the forced switch I had no service and for 2 years they told oh we’re working on it and nothing so I switched to another provider and now they WILL NOT GIVE ME the number that i’ve had ever since I’ve had a phone. Because they are saying it’s theirs. They have done nothing but harassed us. 0 out of 10 DO NOT USE T-MOBILE.
Worst experience ofva cell phone provider there too far gone to improve. Awful awful awful. Don't use you will regret it

We were assured 100% that we would have coverage where we lived. The guy said we would get our activation back and everything if we didn't....   Well guess what NO SERVICE.  We went back to the T-Mobile store cancelled our service and the guy said we would get our activation fee back by a Visa gift card within 10 days... Waited did not get gift card.  I called and T-Mobile, he said that it did not go through, nothing he can do but try again... Waited again the Visa gift cards were declined.. Then T-Mobile took a month of service out of my checking account.   We had for 1 day.......  I called customer service this time and again said they would send me Visa gift cards for the money.. Now that is $140.00 total..  Waited got nothing !!!  I called again but always declined..  T-Mobile is terrible.

Misleading sales, they promised one month free for me to sign up then they charged me anyway. Good luck getting any help from the customer service. Trying to get my money back for 3 months and getting the run around. Horrible service, and sales reps tell you anything to get you in. Coverage is not what they promise and don’t do an auto pay to get the discount. If you disconnect your service, they still keep charging you without a refund. False advertisement.

Is it possible to give 0 stars? 
I was billed for a phone that I returned. I have email proof that t-mobile received the phone. And was still billed almost 700 dollars for this. I called t-mobile who then told me "it's fine we will put the bill on hold because your phone is at the wearhouse, it just has not been scanned". However, even after a 40 minute phone call, the next day I get a bank notification that the payment was being processed. I called again and the same thing. They say "our bad, the bill will be put on hold. Tell your bank that blah blah blah." And today I wake up and all my money has gone to this stupid phone which got somehow scanned in the wrong warehouse. I am active duty military. And if you want, you can look at what I get paid a month, to which you'll see that the 700 equals about a THIRD of my monthly pay. That is money that is suppose to go to my school loans and other bills which I cannot pay now. I am going to have late fees. My bank is probably going to fine me because of this. This money was also supposed to go towards a visit of my mom's who I get to see maybe once a year. But its fine because I'll get a refund in 3-5 days right? It's a holiday week. I am overseas, and I'm broke right now. So no. It's not fine. I don't know how t-mobile is going to fix this but they'd better. The crappy service I pay out of my ass while being overseas isn't worth me loosing my savings. 

Update: they have been promising my refund. They said 3-5 business days. It has been 2 weeks and I have been calling EVERY DAY. Every time I call they say "oh you'll get it in 24 hours." And it has been denied twice. (This has been going on for 2 months).

I have a business account and was paying a bill for someone else, I asked if a receipt could be emailed me to me and they said yes. After they took my credit card information they switched it and said they would not email me a receipt and hung up on me. Reveals alot about how they do business, if you have an account with these guys I would look elsewhere

These guys are scam artist. I switched from them to Verizon because I was getting a a better a deal and when I closed my account they let it run so I had to pay again instead of just collecting the payment and closing the account and they didn’t contact me until it was about to go to collections. They are mad because Verizon gave me a better deal and try to mess with my money. Stupid f***kn monopoly of a company that doesn’t care about its customers.

Where do I start? I have spent more time on the phone with this under trained company then it's worth. Been a customer for 15 years, I AM DONE!!!! I was a Sprint customer. They became TMOBLIE and they SUCK. Security breaches I am STILL DEALING WITH EVEN THOUGH YOU ARE SUPPOSE TO PROVIDE A LICENSE OR BE AUTHORIZED and I Am the only one ever!!!!! i had a note to put on one of my lines and my daughter lost service obviously but they have no clue how it happened. My account has been in the toilet ever since. SIMS stolen from phones with SIMS intact in phone, They unlocked my lines without consent and went to transfer it out. Their resolution for not being able to connect to WIFI in forever was since I have unlimited service is that I don't need WIFI. Then why am I paying for something I can not access? I have a woman's name but they call me sir, ignorant. I have been on the phone with this issue over 8 hours and now they want me to take it into the store. I have had to pay for replacements buy new phones all in one year I have spent over 3000  just to be a customer over my regular billing. I'm glad I didn't buy stock in this company. My next stop is the BBB. I do not feel I should have had to pay for them to give out access to my personal account because this is where my ENTIRE ISSUE started. If they actually did their job to begin with and went by their standard there would not have been a phone assigned to my account that was not assigned by me the only one permitted to make any changes or access my account at all yet they compromised my account and I paid for this crap and I am STILL after all this time on the phone with them for months on end. Go into the store, on the phone for DAYS AT A TIME, i DON'T EVEN GET TO SPEAND TIME WITH MY FAMILY OVER THIS. I'm listing the date of experience as today but that's a lie because this has been ONGOING now for about 9 months. The update they did yesterday took out our WIFI connecting abilities across platforms and TMOBILE says it's not their problem. Half of my phone lines will no longer do a WIFI connection any longer. If you have an apple phone TMOBILE will help you, if not they don't care and will move you to at least 5 different people, everyone treating you like a circus monkey. They will all have you do all the same things you did before you called then they will have you preform like a monkey again then refuse the treat of their service until you preform for each of them as they transfer you to someone else. Then, if you express that you have done the process MULTIPLE TIMES ALREADY, they refuse to do anything at all until you comply, then as an extra laugh they transfer you after they tell you it's your internet that has 50 available slots with only 13 being filled and the only ones not functionable are on a TMOBILE network which BTW, as I keep telling these people the SIMS issue in functioning is that there is no active sims in the wifi side. It is no longer assigned and needs to be reassigned to the WIFI network to connect. Physically inserted because a detect is not resolving the issue on all phones. There is a MAC issue associated with this I noticed as well. I am not sure if this is due to the security breach or yesterdays update. That is what I know is the problem with EVERY PHONE IN MY HOME. The Iphone is the easiest to restore this issue but a patch would be more logical. I do not believe they have any ACTUAL TECH PEOPLE AT tmobile as no one had a single clue as to what I was explaining nor did the manufactures. All they had to do was go to their WIFI at TMOBILE and physically enter the SIMS into the network as they will not allow you to do it. Don't bother calling, they won't do it either. I asked, that's what got me in this mess. I asked them to assign my SIMS back onto my WIFI and restore my MAC which is also not appearing at all. So I get no help, over 8 hours on the phone, I get to pay for WIFI but I don't actually get to use it anf the TMOBILE reps were great with that idea instead of just assigning the network that was lost. WOW???? I even gave them the SIMS number and told them how to get there and that may have restored my MAC issue in the process as well but hey, why do that when people like me can just pay for service they can't access because it's bundled and half of my lines MIGHT get the advantage.

edits.text: I have been a customer for 13 years. I can't even get access to an upgrade without paying 430.00 out of pocket. The CSR tells me maybe if I paid my bill on time (always pay before my due date btw) I could get an upgrade. I asked him if they allow everyone 16 lines who are not in good standing? Then he got snooty and told me that no wonder I can't upgrade, because I have to many lines. I miss Sprint. I have 5 lines left with small balances. I will be paying them off and porting out ALL of my lines. They called me 2 times. Left me messages that they can upgrade my phone, conveniently leaving out the fee of over 430.00. Great service guys. Don't do it. I waited over a year for an upgrade and since February I have wasted at least 30 hours on the phone with them MULTIPLE TIMES. Good bye to 13 years of service come February. CSR are of 100% NO HELP. only full of penny pinching excuses. Ya, they only call to try to get more money from me. Bait and switch guys.

text:
Basically it’s your typical internet company where the right hand doesn’t know what the left is doing.

Poor connection, poor speeds, and poor service. I’d say avoid them if possible.

December 6th, 2022
My son got phone service through t-mobile, about a month later he was sentenced to six months in jail he called t-mobile to cancel the line and explained he was going to jail for six months and asked will he be able to reactivate his line with the same number, the representative he talked to told him instead of deactivating the line he could just temporarily suspend the line once every 90 days and he would be able to keep his phone line. My son then made me an authorized user on his account so I can suspend the line every 90 days. My son suspended the line and 90 days later I called to suspend the line which to my knowledge it was suspended cause I talked to a representative to suspend it. Out of nowhere my son get a bill in the mail for over $1,000 so I called t-mobile to see why, they said for past due bill, I explained to the representative that he's not supposed to have a bill cause the line is supposed to be suspended after awhile the representative found that the line was supposed to be suspended but someone from t-mobile canceled the whole line and it made his account accumulate a bill and was sent to a collection agency. The representative told me to call the collection agency to tellthem its a fault on t-mobile behalf and t-mobile was removing those charges but when I called the collection agency they told me t-mobile needs to contact them. I called t-mobile again and explained to them the collection agency needed them to call about getting that collection removed from my son's credit report. After speaking g to about 3 different people they said they would start an investigation and call us back in a few days, I did get a call back from t-mobile but the lady called and said after our investigation we found d that he does owe that balance & there's nothing we can do. I don't understand why he owes a bill and the line was supposed to be suspended and the representative clearly stated that during the time the line is suspended he wouldn't have to pay a bill because the phone's not being used and one representative told us it was a mistake on their behalf. This the worst phone company to deal with. I, myself has been with t-mobile since 2003 a few months ago I called to cancel just a tablet line on my account but t-mobile decided to cancel the tablet as well as the four phone lines on my account & when they reactivated my lines I couldn't even get the same plan I had prior to their screw-up, I was so disappointed because my faand I had the same family plan for almost 20 years and couldn't get it back. After this foolishness they just pulled on my son not only me but the rest of my family is cutting ties with them. They screw up your account and it's like they tell you "so we messed up and we're not gonna fix it, now you can pay us for messing up and keep your service or you can have this on your credit report and still owe us for our screw-ups". Run from this phone company. I normally don't leave reviews but I'll be leaving reviews & telling our story all over social media as well to friends and other families!

I received a nice paperweight today ... the iPhone 14 Pro Max ... doing the setup and the QR code is no longer active ... is it apple or tmobile that are the total screw ups?  Or is it both are really bad?

I was very surprised this evening when I called TMobile for a problem with my cell phone acct. I was totally prepared and expecting the normal resistance I normally experience when calling customer service. I was angry and prepared for a battle, what I wasn't prepared for was the customer service woman "Lila' to be kind, compassionate and understanding of my situation. I expected this "Kindness" to end after a minute or two. Surprisingly Lila's kindness continued.  I then told her in very few words, what I needed corrected, and that it needed to be corrected now, not in "48 hours" when some other agent calls me. There was a pause, then she said, ....Mrs......I would be upset if this had happened to me too. What?? Am I still talking to T Mobile? As she corrected my account, we chatted. The next thing I know, I am signing up for a new line, and will be receiving the iphone 14 pro max in GOLD! in my mailbox. This phone is on backorder till Mid January 2023. How she did this I don't know, but I am thrilled to be receiving it.
As we hung up, she thanked me for being a loyal customer, No LiLa - THANK YOU for Great Customer Service!!

Been with T-Mobile for 16 years; thank you Shay for your customer service today, you're one of the reasons we haven't needed to explore other options.
I should mention the online chat feature for customer service is not helpful. That's okay I just call in and someone's always available to help (Except at night).
James at the Aliquippa store is a Duuuude
I was charged $800 for calls to India about a job. But when I call customer service, I have to call to India. Crooks! There should have at least been a warning or disclaimer. I am done with T Mobile.

Got a add clearly says get 4 free Iphone13 free it says 0 about trade INS even in the small print that's wasting everyone's time it's dumb and not right to not have that posted on the pics but it's posted at the store and 100 bucks a month is actually either 140 or 160 after taxes and fees if you did get free phones
